creator: rflynn@acsalaska.net
text:
Hi,

the port cannot fix this, as the port cannot possibly know what other
daemons might depend on it, based on one of it's many uses. Slapd is not
a name service resolution daemon. It's a directory service.

You are however free to edit slapd start up script and add BEFORE: lines
that reflect your installation needs. See rcorder(8).
-- 
Mel
